nuke-desc: Waxay siisaa maamulayaasha awood ay ku [[Special:Nuke|tirtiraan bogag badan]] hal mar
nuke-defaultreason: Tirtirid ballaaran oo bogag uu ku daray [[Special:Contributions/$1|{{GENDER:$1|$1}}]]
nuke-defaultreason-tempaccount: Tirtirid ballaaran oo bogag ay ku darsadeen akoonno ku-meelgaar ah
nuke-multiplepeople: Tirtirid ballaaran oo bogag dhawaan la daray
nuke-tools:
Qalabkani wuxuu oggolaanayaa tirtirid ballaaran oo bogag uu dhawaan ku daray isticmaale gaar ah ama cinwaan IP.

Geli magaca isticmaalaha ama cinwaanka IP-ga si aad u hesho liiska bogagga la tirtirayo, ama ka tag banaan si loo eego dhammaan isticmaalayaasha.
nuke-tools-tempaccount: Qalabkani wuxuu oggolaanayaa tirtirid ballaaran oo bogag uu dhawaan ku daray isticmaale gaar ah ama akoon ku-meelgaar ah. Geli magaca isticmaalaha ama cinwaanka IP-ga si aad u hesho liiska bogagga la tirtirayo, ama ka tag banaan si loo eego dhammaan isticmaalayaasha. Haddii IP la geliyo, waxaa la soo bandhigi doonaa dhammaan bogagga uu sameeyay IP-gaas ama akoonnada ku-meelgaarka ah ee laga isticmaalay IP-gaas.
nuke-tools-prompt: Ka dib marka la soo bandhigo bogagga, dooro bogagga aad rabto in la tirtiro, ka dibna guji '{{int:nuke-submit-continue}}'. Bogagga dib-u-hagista waxaa lagu muujiyaa farta leexsan.
nuke-tools-prompt-restricted: Weli waxaad isticmaali kartaa qalabkan si aad u soo bandhigto bogagga, laakiin ma awoodi doontid inaad tirtirto.
nuke-tools-notice-error: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la xaqiijinayay awooddaada tirtiridda ballaaran ee bogagga, sidaas darteed laguma oggola inaad sameyso.
nuke-tools-notice-noperm: Ma lihid oggolaansho aad ku tirtirto bogag badan hal mar.
nuke-tools-notice-blocked: Xannibaad firfircoon ayaa saameynaysa awooddaada tirtiridda ballaaran ee bogagga.
nuke-tools-confirm: Bogagga soo socda {{PLURAL:$1|bog ayaa la doortay in la tirtiro|$1 bogag ayaa la doortay in la tirtiro}}. Bixi soo koobid wax-ka-beddel, ka dibna guji '{{int:nuke-submit-delete}}' si loo bilaabo tirtiridda bogagga.
nuke-userorip: Magaca isticmaalaha, cinwaanka IP-ga ama ka tag banaan:
nuke-maxpages: Tirada bogagga la soo saarayo (ugu badnaan 500):
nuke-minsize: Cabbirka ugu yar ee nuxurka bogga (baytyo):
nuke-maxsize: Cabbirka ugu yar ee nuxurka bogga (baytyo):
nuke-associated: Marka lagu daro bogagga la doortay, ku dar bogagga la xiriira si loo tirtiro:
nuke-date-limited: Kaliya bogagga la abuuray {{PLURAL:$1|maalintii ugu dambeysay|$1 maalmood ee ugu dambeysay}} ayaa la tirtiri karaa. Fadlan beddel taariikhda si ay ugu jirto xadka la oggol yahay.
nuke-delete-summary: Waxaa safka geliyay in la tirtiro '''{{PLURAL:$1|bog hal|$1 bogag}}'''.
nuke-delete-summary-user: Waxaa safka geliyay in la tirtiro '''{{PLURAL:$1|bog hal|$1 bogag}}''' {{GENDER:$2|la sameeyay}} oo uu sameeyay [[{{ns:user}}:$2|$2]] ([[{{ns:user_talk}}:$2|{{int:talkpagelinktext}}]] {{int:pipe-separator}} [[{{ns:special}}:Contributions/$2|{{int:contribslink}}]] {{int:pipe-separator}} [[{{ns:special}}:Block/$2|{{int:blocklink}}]]).
nuke-deletion-queued: Bogga '''$1''' waxaa loo geliyay safka tirtiridda.
nuke-skipped-summary: {{PLURAL:$1|'''Bog hal''' lama dooran in la tirtiro|'''$1 bogag''' lama dooran in la tirtiro}}.
nuke-deletemore: Tirtir bogag badan oo dheeraad ah
nuke-pattern: Qaabka SQL LIKE (tusaale %) ee magaca bogga:
nuke-nolist: Si aad u sii wadato, marka hore guji '{{int:nuke-submit-list}}', ka dibna dooro bogagga lagu dari doono safka tirtiridda.
nuke-nopages-global: Ma jiraan bogag u dhigma raadinta.
nuke-searchnotice-minmorethanmax: Cabbirka ugu yar ee baytyada ayaa ka weyn cabbirka ugu badan ee baytyada, sidaas darteed suurtagal ma aha in bog kasta uu buuxiyo shuruudahan.
nuke-searchnotice-negmax: Cabbirka ugu badan ee baytyada waa ka yar eber, sidaas darteed waa la iska indha tirayaa.
nuke-searchnotice-negmin: Cabbirka ugu yar ee baytyada waa ka yar eber, sidaas darteed waa la iska indha tirayaa.
nuke-noselected: Si aad u sii wadato, dooro bogagga lagu dari doono safka tirtiridda.
nuke-associated-limited: Bogag qaar lama soo bandhigi karin sababtoo ah ku darista bogagga la xiriira (bogagga wadahadalka, dib u hagista) waxay ka badan lahayd xadka la oggol yahay.
nuke-namespace-invalid: Meesha magacani ma aha mid sax ah. Fadlan ka dooro kaliya xulashooyinka ku jira liiska.
nuke-namespace-noscript: Geli aqoonsiyada meelaha magacyada, mid walba sadar gaar ah. Haddii aad banaan uga tagto, dhammaan meelaha magacyada waa la raadin doonaa. Aqoonsiyada aan saxda ahayn waa la iska indha tirayaa.
nuke-linkoncontribs-text: Tirtir bogagga halka {{GENDER:$1|isticmaalahan}} uu yahay qoraaga kaliya
nuke-daterange-helper-text-max-age-diffe: Haddii la bixiyo magaca isticmaale ama cinwaanka IP-ga, bogagga ilaa {{PLURAL:$1|maalin|$1 maalmood}} jir ah waa la soo celin karaa. Haddii kale, sababo la xiriira waxqabadka, bogagga ilaa {{PLURAL:$2|maalin|$2 maalmood}} jir ah waa la soo celin karaa.
nuke-daterange-helper-text-max-age-same: Sababo la xiriira waxqabadka, bogagga ilaa {{PLURAL:$1|maalin|$1 maalmood}} jir ah waa la soo celin karaa.
